Description: The name or title of this automation.
The system used to create this flow.
The type of flow, usually the same as the type of trigger.
The ID of the environment to be used in URLs.
A short description of what this automation does.
The URL that can be used for launching this flow.
Custom tags and keywords for searching.
Additional notes, comments, links, or important remarks.
List of SharePoint Lists that this flow uses.
Child flows used by this flow.
Code for this flow, if available. This is typically formatted as JSON.
Indicates whether this flow is active (turned on).
